title: Paralabatia parviflora
taxonomy: Paralabatia parviflora is classified within the family Chrysomelidae, specifically within the subfamily Chrysomelinae. This plant belongs to the order Coleoptera, which comprises beetles. The classification further breaks down to the kingdom Animalia, phylum Arthropoda, and class Insecta. The family Chrysomelidae is commonly known as leaf beetles, with Paralabatia parviflora being a specific species within this group. Further detailed classification of this species may be found in scientific databases and taxonomic resources.
uses: Paralabatia parviflora, also known as the African ebony or the African blackwood, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes.
